review_text:
Wanna get away from the everyday grind?
Love this place..
Clean
Lovely people
Gr8 fishing
Im comin back n ill see u there❤️
Amazing caravan park, with great cabins, sites for big rigs, caravans, campers and tents! Stunning views of Lake Macquarie!

I absolutely loved our weekend stay! It’s such a warm, family friendly holiday park— my daughter especially enjoyed the playground and pool. Everyone we seen were so friendly and always greeting us with big smiles. The park was spotless and beautifully maintained. We’re already looking forward to coming back again soon!
Beautiful park to stay, well maintained and can't fault this place for a nice getaway!!
非常漂亮，干净，设施齐全，洗手间，淋浴房，洗衣房都有，而且干净整洁

Lovely spot to camp, and even lovelier service!
Had the pleasure of having Lisa look after us for a last minute spot on easter sunday, and she was so kind, friendly, and just a great person!

The site itself is great, had live music, beautifully looked after amenities, could not have asked for more!
What a beautiful clean, tidy well managed park. can't wait to re revisit

We stayed at this place this week, we loved it. Lisa was super nice and accommodating when we arrived and told us what sites to see.
The room was tidy, the pool was clean and the kids park was so nice. When you walk around the lake you can see a lovely sunset in the evening. Would definitely stay again.
We stayed on a powered site. The caravan park is well set out with lovely views of the lake. It has a great camp kitchen. Amenities are clean and well maintained.

Loved staying here. Great location surrounded by Lake Macquarie on three sides. Paved walkway surrounding the park that follows the lake. Had an ensuite van site which is close to the lake and slightly elevated for a perfect view. Staff were friendly, welcoming and so helpful
Roads are a little on the skinny side like most van parks. Generous sites, slab absolutely level. Modern ensuite. Camp kitchen next to us with a covered and indoor one just down the road. Another near reception near the pool and playground. Amenities block well equipped, kept very tidy. Lots of clothesline space
Dog friendly and has a dog wash as well. Places to launch the boat and for cleaning your catch when you get back
Small shop at reception with a variety of van merchandise, food and drink. Coles just two minutes down the road. Close to pubs and cafes
Just a really lovely relaxing place to stay
One small comment is a shelf in the ensuite would be good. There is not enough counter space on the sink especially when two people are using it
Highly recommend a stay here
Best place to stay in lake Macquarie for a family with the lake across the road perfection
My wife and I  stayed at the park  last week. It was great. The staff are very friendly and helpful. All  amenities are very  clean and modern. Awesome location. We will  be  returning
Great location, facilities extremely clean, multiple BBQ areas (spotless), very nice pool.   Definitely would return.   Staff friendly and helpful.

Handy, neat and tidy.
Cabin was clean and well setup.
Our dog was grateful for the outdoor area.

One  of  the  best  caravan  parks  we  have  visited  over  the  last  54 years,  sites  mostly  double  concrete slabs,  beautiful  water  facing  outlook for  most,  modern  clean  amenities,  modern  clean  camp  kitchens, great  good  sized  swimming  pool with  hoist  for  invalids. Staff  extremely  friendly  and  helpful, great  area  for  boating, cycling, walking  tracks, and  close  to  shops, eateries  etc. Our  first  visit  but  definitely  not  our  last
Belmont holiday park is a great place for a peaceful holiday and rest. Great views by the lakeside sites, great people around as well.

First time at Belmont Lakeside Holiday Park and we are impressed! It is now one of our favourite places we've stayed. We loved everything about the park; beautiful lake views from every part of the park (especially at sunrise and sunset), amenities were great, the cabin we stayed in was comfortable and had everything we needed, it was peaceful, super clean, everyone was friendly and respectful.  The kids loved the pool and park.
Already working out when we will be back!!
Thanks Belmont, keep up the great work
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

a pleasant surprise!
we only required two nights travelling back home  but we are definitely making sure we plan to stay here again when we head north again.
Clean , beautiful location , nice pool & put on lots of activities over the school holidays.
Our first stay had us impressed & keen to return... a beautiful little park on Lake Macquarie that is very well maintained...
Great caravan park, friendly staff. The amenities were clean and tidy. Would stop there again.

Love this Holiday Park. Very neat and tidy & staff were very helpful and friendly.
We had a pet friendly cabin and my kitty felt comfortable and was very relaxed.
Would definitely recommend this place.
Unfortunately no ensuite sites for caravans.
Managed to fit a car and campervan in the last space which was very nice of them. The views at sunset were beautiful

“A Caravan Park That Just Keeps Getting Better!”
This caravan park has been thoughtfully updated and improved over the years, and it truly shows. Every visit reveals something new, fresh facilities, upgraded amenities, and a real commitment to keeping the park modern, comfortable, and welcoming for all types of travellers.

The location is unbeatable with so many things to do.

With its ongoing upgrades, fantastic location, and outstanding staff, it’s no surprise our customers at Caravan Spares and Repairs are raving about this park. It’s a place people love coming back to, and it just keeps getting better.
Excellent stay!
Clean park with clean amenities, friendly people and a great location...can get windy on occasions so remember your jumpers . Top spot to stay and kid friendly.

We stayed on a waterfront caravan site, what a beautiful spot! The whole park is well kept, beautifully clean modern amenities.
Lovely welcoming staff, I can see why this park is so popular, we hope to return in the new year!
Great park.Friendly people when you book in.Beautiful location.

Great place for a break.
Had a cabin, really clean, staff really helpfull.
Would go back in a heart beat.
Great Park. The views are 180% around you on this peninsula. Very clean & tidy.
We stayed there so lovely and clean. Very relaxing park 👍

Belmont Lakeside Holiday Park is a fantastic spot for a campervan stay. I stayed for two nights and switched to a lakeside view accommodation on the second day, which was absolutely wonderful. The view and setting right by the lake really added to the experience.The park’s location is very nice and close enough to town for convenience but still peaceful and not too close to the hustle. It’s a high-demand location, so booking in advance is recommended. All the amenities were well-maintained and clean, which made the stay comfortable and hassle-free. Overall, Belmont Lakeside Holiday Park offers a great balance of natural beauty and accessibility, making it a top choice for campervan travelers looking to relax by the water while staying near the town.
A top van park with caravan spots and cabin accommodation aplenty.

Tried re-booking a cabin at Belmont after having to cancel at another Lakeside Holiday Park, and it was looking pretty expensive at first. That was until Niesha gave me an alternative to suit my timing, my needs and my budget, at her expense. While she did not get the business, her unselfish concern for my welfare has won me over and I will go out of my way to promote Belmont Holiday park to all and any. We will definitely come and stay some time, just to meet this caring, real, personable human being. Thanks Niesha. Amazing.

Such a beautiful place to stay
Couldn’t thank Lisa enough for helping us out in a very sticking situation
All staff are loving very clean quiet we will be returning

Lisa & mick were Amazing, we couldnt thank them enough after our previous booking fell through. We have already booked again! The room was clean & bed was comfortable. The views are beautiful & the pool was super clean! We're so happy we found this place!
Lovely lakeside location. Close to beaches, lake access and shopping precints to cater to daily needs. Highway is busy nearby but road noise is minimal.

The facilities we're lovely! we stayed in cabins and found them to be extremely clean and well look after. The view was amazing of course and the staff were very friendly and helpful when we had some questions.
Lovely spot for all!

Great park.
Very friendly service.
Bloody useless wifi.
Stunning Location surrounded by water right on the shores of Lake Macquarie . We stayed in our motorhome great facilities , bbq, toilets & showers, an amazing camp kitchen

What an absolutely magnificent place to stay. Plenty of sites. Lovely walking tracks. Amazing views of the water and spectacular sunsets. Incredibly clean, modern and well maintained amenities. Residents are incredibly friendly as well. Highly recommend this place to stay during your travels. Beautiful beach not too far away as well. Perfect for walks and swimming. You won't be disappointed. Will definitely be back.

Picturesque spot! We had a caravan site in a Lakeside position and enjoyed watching the beautiful sunsets. This was our second visit. Staff were cheerful and accommodating. Amenities were clean. It was nice and quiet at night time. Belmont 16's is a good place to visit for lunch.
Great clean caravan park.
Great camp kitchen ,excellent sites,

Beautiful place seems very popular place even in the off season  360° veie around the lake coffee van in the morning very clean  toilets showers  camp kitchen small  very  windy at times  they would have alot of returns if there staff weren't so rude they are not welcoming with pets   or campers don't bother if your vans not 150k+  feel judged  I'm sure with better  lower management given the boot and friendlier staff this place would have been given a better star rating to match the location   would say in summer season you would have to book in advance this  location is amazing   but  holiday parks should be more relaxed for all families all people for everyone to enjoy no matter what your  income
Very clean and maintained park. Staff are courteous and very friendly. The views are so relaxing and quiet. Swans, ducks and parrots. So enjoying this park.
Really nice place to stay with our Motorhome.
This park has very clean amenities and rooms. It has a lovely outlook and staff are great.

We had a spot right on the lake for our caravan it's fantastic & emenites are the best & cleanest we've seen for a long time recommended this place as one of the best caravan parks we've been to will definitely be back 😀 👍

The staff gave me false and misleading information when I was organising a booking for a large group. This caused me significant inconvenience. Very poor service to give false and misleading information

We stayed in our River van for 5 nights on the point of the Lake 102site…what a great van park, but we found it impressive, clean tidy great views and sunsets amazing!

Pet friendly, great walking paths, small boat ramps and looks like more work is happening on the foreshore

Showers great pressure and NOT push button timed, all amenities great

We will be back, thanks Chris and Emma
Awesome caravan sites 👌
Stayed for two nights in our van. Excellent park. Amenities are very clean. Great views. We will be back again.
Didn’t stay in rooms stayed in caravan

This caravan park in a magnificent location has amazing facilities, with every possible need catered for (including dog wash!) It’s taken to another level by a management style that provides a benchmark for all others – a true credit to Lisa and Mick who went above and beyond to ensure we had the perfect experience at our powered site.  We loved our 3-day stay in every way and hope to return one day, all the way from SE Victoria.
Absolutely beautiful little gem! The staff that looked after our booking were so lovely and accommodating! Wish we were staying more than one night. Thank you for having us!
Great park!
Beautiful views of the lake too

We stayed there for 8 weeks and we will never go back the amount of idiots with dogs off leash the dog pooh everywhere no one follows the rules with bikes and scateboards no helmets they just do what ever they like and also access to the public that can just walk in there any time they want it's really bad so that's a big NO for this park 😡
Lovely park. Great location.

Self service but all powered sites.
Kitchen and Amenities are all very clean and reasonable price to use laundry
One of the most amazing places to stay, right on the lake and the bird life is stunning. If you want somewhere to just chill there is no better in the Newcastle area.

A great location right on the water & easy access for kayaks & water sports. Lots of walks for dogs. $5/load of washing. Cold water only. Timed showers 4 mins! Everything needs a code. We had a powered site. Concrete slabs for both van & awning.
Fabulous location beautiful views

We Had The Best Time Here Celebrating Valentines Day ❤️ One of the Best Holiday Parks on the East Coast,  Beautiful Views of Lake Macquarie ,Great For Families, Couples, Campers or Grey Nomads,  Well Located & The Park is Top Quality, The Pool is Amazing & BBQ n kids play area nearby , Great if you have A boat or kyaking etc The Staff Were Amazing & We Will Definitely Be Back Again  😎

Nice and clean park. Amenities are fairly good and clean. Location superbly located on Lake Mac. The only downside is that the water pressure at the powered sites were very low which meant gas Hot water doesn't work and the park showers are timed. Other than that a great park that's also pet friendly.
In our caravan, amenities well looked after and clean.

We had a wonderful family weekend. Two families stayed on powered sites, and one family stayed in a cabin. There were 10 of us in total. We took a kayak and everone had fun on the water, which was right in front of 2 of the  families' spots. We went swimming in the pool and  walked. The playground was a hit with our grandkids! There was even a nice spot of grass to play cricket. My husband and I have stayed before with the grandkids, which was great too! It is definitely somewhere we will again stay at. Thanks

We have been going to this caravan park for roughly 7 years it is our favourite caravan park the staff are incredible. The service is amazing. The location is absolutely gorgeous. I always get the best sunset photos. It is just the most welcoming caravan park with so many nice people. It's such a special place to me. I highly recommend giving this place a visit.

I’ve been to a lot of caravan parks in my time,this is my 2nd stay here, I don’t usually write reviews but when you get exceptional service you need to do one. Mick and Lisa make you very welcome, this is one of the cleanest parks I have ever been at. Lawns and amenities are immaculate, all the staff are so friendly, I think they are worth more money.  Dave and Wendy.
Loved this place. Great clean facilities.  Awesome spot. (Almost like a private island) will definitely  recommend.

I stayed at the camping place for about 2 nights. The camping has a nice location and everything you need.
I just want to make the new visitors beware that there lays a DEAD ANIMAL above the grate from the WATER TANK next to the women and men toilets on the site where you can wash and dry your clothes. You could already see the bones of the animal.
It has been there for some time. That’s kind of disgusting. And to be honest, I don’t know if they really clean it up. I already told the reception. He told me that they don’t use the water, but I’m not really sure about that.
Great place friendly staff great view

Nice location,  but thats where it stops. Amenities during our stay were not cleaned really well, corners and anywhere that might have to stretch were not cleaned. Bench tops in amenities were old and needed replacing, e- scooters flew around, even though it says e- scooters not allowed, our site was never mowed or whipper snipped the whole time we were there. Thank the semi permanents, for mowing and whipping snipping ,as grass was long. Dog breeds should be checked, as there were dogs on the list that should not of been allowed, in there and almost got our little dog. Doesnt take much to quickly check the dogs at bookin time as alot of parks do now when you travel OZ.

Our experience was always friendly, faultless, smooth flowing with staff going out of their way on checkin. The amenities, camp kitchen & grounds were always kept clean & tidy. We’ve decided to return sometime to stay longer & relax & explore more of this stunning area. Certainly would highly recommend to anyone.
Nice spot on beautiful Lake Macquarie. Well maintained Holiday Park. So close to the Murrays Beach to Adamstown Cycleway. 👍

A caravan park at a stunning location, very clean and quiet, with the most lovely and supportive staff. We enjoyed our stay at Belmont Lakeside Holiday Park to the fullest, especially the beautiful sunset at the lake. Fortunately, a fisherman cleaned his catch at the lakeside what attracted a bunch of pelicans...

Such a beautiful
location and the whole park is so well maintained.  The grounds and gardens are beautiful to walk around.
Great spot right on the lake
Schöner Platz am Wasser. Sanitäre Anlagen sehr ordentlich bis auf die separate Toilette, da funktionierte das Licht nicht richtig. Vorher reservieren empfohlen.
nice photos!
Schöner Camping Platz auf einer Halbinsel gelegen. Sehr ruhig mit toller Aussicht. Ausstattung gut und alles sauber. Sehr freundliche Inhaber beim CheckIn.

This park is amazing.
Sunsets are absolutely stunning.
Facilities are top notch.

The website is very deceiving! We were passing through with our small dog & needed somewhere to stay for the night. The website DOESN'T state anywhere that it's a 2 night minimum for pet friendly cabins. We were throughly disappointed as we needed somewhere to stay on our long journey.
What a shame!
Fantastic park, great location, park was very well maintained, amenities always clean, would definitely stay there again
Stayed in our caravan lovely place tidy amenities staff lovely. Highly recommend
Really great park. Lovely people in office. Looking forward to coming back. Cannot fault the park.

Very nice park. Great staff.
Perfect position

Since the new owners took over the park has just gone up and up we come here once a year and will continue to come besides the AMAZING views we get the staff of Lisa and her crew are just simply the best im not 100% confident in reversing the van but the grounds crew are more than happy to help you in any way and being a dog friendly park is just the best as our 3 fur baby's came with us this time and just had the best time especially with blacksmiths beach being close by to let them off leash and have fun in the surf
Beautiful spot here better than previously Great managers also our new home for holidays 😄
Absolutely great little caravan park, great amenities, pool, camp kitchen, very well maintained

Good: Stunning location, peaceful park and close to cafe/shops.||||That’s where the good points end unfortunately.||||Terrible: If I could give 0 stars to the husband and wife ‘managers’, I would. Incredibly rude (especially the husband) and incompetent.||||We had 2 sites (10 & 11 - powered tent sites) which firstly, are terribly zoned - they’re triangled behind other sites and you can’t access them without crossing neighbouring sites, which makes unloading/packing inconvenient and disruptive to others.||||We had 3 cars total for the 2 sites, which clearly caused extreme confusion for the managers. They gave a gate code at check-in for 1st car and lifted boom-gate for 2nd car (which both arrived together) and later gave a code to 3rd car to enter. They first phoned us at 6pm saying to “get the car out” as we were only allowed 1 car per site (2 cars). We apologised and immediately moved 1 car outside the grounds, and then at 8pm got another phone call asking if we had “moved the car”, which we said we had.||||At 10pm we were sitting quietly under our gazebo playing cards, when the male manager stomped up out of the darkness and said “ya’s have been asked again and again and ya’s are just rorting the system, how many times do ya need to be told to get the car out?” - which we were dumbfounded by the question and blatant rudeness - particularly in front of our worried 2 year old child who was sitting on my knee. We said we had moved a car outside the gates at 6pm and didn’t know what he was talking about - he said something about gate codes being per car not per site and that we shouldn’t have used the code to get the other car out because now the system doesn’t know that a car is in that it thinks is out??? we eventually worked out that all his confusion was caused by our honest mistake of not moving the 2nd car from the grass to our allotted space (an apparent complete ‘rort’), and by saying we had moved the car when asked at 8pm (because the incompetent management didn’t specify which car), he was completely hostile and treated us like liars. We offered to fix the problem (at the time still not understanding what he was talking about) and he said “well it’s too late now, you were asked at 6pm and again at 8pm” and then he just walked off waving his hands dismissing us, again saying “what a rort” as he walked away.||||In the morning we went to the office and spoke with the female manager to clarify what the problem was after the rude confrontation from the male manager, she scoffed and said he’s her husband and then proceeded to talk in circles about how you can’t have too many cars etc, which again - we said we didn’t because we moved one out when asked. ||||I said their concern seemed to be that one car was on the grass and not in the allotted space, which we would have easily fixed if we were told clearly (not to mention politely) at the time. She again reiterated about the (irrelevant) number of cars etc until it was obvious she wasn’t getting the point, and then she said “anyway let’s just forget it now” — no apology for the confusion, hostility or blatant rudeness that we were subjected to as paying guests — on our first ever night camping with our 2 and 4 year old children, which was wrecked for us after the 10pm ‘lecture’, by the way.||||Absolutely disgraceful attitudes and abysmal problem-solving/customer service ‘skills’ to match. Unfortunately thanks to these two clowns we definitely won’t be back. ||||If that’s the nightmare they create over their own terrible directions regarding a car space, good luck if you have a real problem and have to deal with them.
Can't rate the rooms as we have our own caravan. Sites are large. Great Outlook. We continue to go back.
amazing place and friendly service! this is my second time coming to the park we absolutely love it here!

Perfect place to stay if you want to be surrounded by waterviews. The cabin was clean and nice. Close to shops and the local pub. We would go back again. The price was good. The sunset was amazing when we stayed.
Terrific
Our regular goto place with our caravan for a chill out weekend
Beautiful lakeside caravan park, excellent camp kitchen with BBQs. Great kids playground and swimming pool. Bring your kayak!
Well kept and tidy.

This is a well appointed park with all amenities.  The park is very clean and well maintained.  The rooms are clean and well kept. The check in check out was an easy process.The staff are friendly and helpful.I would highly recommend this place for overnight or long stay. .
Good amenities, for caravaning, great spot, great views, handy to all town stuff. Staff very helpful, nothing was a problem
Nice place very clean throughout, close to shop's and cafes
Great improvements around foreshore, as usual great staff, grounds immaculate, more duck population they visit everyday,Jim B
Clean. Stayed a few nights in our van.  Great position in the park.
On the lake with water access! Nice campsites-some with views
Stayed here with our van a few nights, had a great position in the park. Clean amenities and friendly staff. Would definitely return another time.
Beautiful place

Very well appointed and maintained villa and grounds. Booking process was easy. We had a relaxing and memorable stay. Both office and grounds staff were friendly but professional. ||Location on the east of the lake was just perfect. The sunsets were amazing. Dining places and supermarkets were within 20 minutes' drive. ||Recommend highly
Amazing caravan park. Very well kept and the staff are really good. The lake is beautiful.  Top marks.

We have stayed here a couple of times now even though its not far from Home.
The Staff are Excellent , the Location is Excellent and could not recommend highly enough.

Horrible owners. The workers were not accomodating at all for my friends and I, we arrived on site and it was pouring rain and they would not allow each car to drive into the site to unpack. They watched us carry everything out from the car to our camp site in the rain and did offer us any help what so ever. They advised us that we should’ve been more prepared and have made notice of the wet weather (which we did) and advised us that because we arrived “so late” (7pm) that it was our own fault.

Owners are extremely rude ! My friends and I stayed here over the weekend and will not be coming back . We had a late arrival in which we gave plenty of notice for. The owner was claiming we gave no notice and the owners were not understanding or accommodating what so ever. They would not let our cars through in the pouring rain and gave us 5 minutes to unpack everything and get out. After 10 minutes the owner came over and was extremely rude, made nasty comments was hurrying us up and even threatened to kick us out. He complained multiple times on how tired he was and he had been there all day and just wanted to go home and was telling us to plan for the weather and be more prepared even though we prepared as much as possible and the weather app did not say it was raining AT ALL! Will not be coming back ever again do not recommend!

Horrible service. The employees were not accomodating what so ever. My partner and I advised the staff well in advance and reminded them the day of arrival that our group of 9 were going to be arriving at 7pm which was clearly stated over the phone that it was okay as long as we arrived before 8pm. Once we arrived to the park it was pouring raining and we were very aware of the 1 car per site rule however since it was horrible weather we asked if they would all 4 cars into the park so we can unpack the cars and once we were finished unpacking they would move the cars back outside to the carpark. However, the owners were very rude and obnoxious advising that it was our own fault that we did not prepare for the weather and we should have arrived earlier, they refused to let more then 2 cars in and watched from their window all of us grabbing our stuff from the cars parked outside the park and walking it to our site in the pouring rain. I was very understanding of their rules and we were very aware of the weather but was very taken back and dissappointed that they refused to help and blamed us for not being well enough prepared.
Always love coming here with my family an fur baby
We brought our caravan here & stayed a week. The location is fantastic. Almost all sites have water views. The park is modern & clean.
Lovely staff, great park, very clean and well maintained.
Peaceful park with beautiful views.  We will be back.
Stayed on this site in our rented motorhome for 3 nights on a water side pitch. This place is fantastic nice walk into town. Friendly staff at reception shower block and swimming pool lovely

Service was so wrong. Initially informed okay to have 2x dogs and then once money was taken from the office person and once she saw the dogs were "big" although not really big. They are absolute sooks and gentle she grudged and refused service because one is a pitbull. A trip to a place to stay to be turned away after money taken.. If there were requirements for sizing of the animals state that before informing "yes you can come and stay" and taking the money.
We were camping on a powered site. Sites are very big and well laid out. Perfect venue, on the lake. Great pool, camp kitcehn and amenities.
Great place, amazing views from the park and the staff were great excellent!
Absolutely beautiful setting
All good

We stay here regularly when visiting family who live nearby. We take our caravan and sometimes the grandkids stay with us. It is a good place for kids. Amenities are great and  clean. Staff are friendly and helpful. We will return 😊

Lakeside villas are terrific
Friendly service

Lovely grounds in this park situated right on Lake Macquarie. Helpful staff (the groundsman even helped us park the camper trailer which we just picked up), great amenities block and there was a nice friendly vibe among our fellow campers. Puppies were welcomed too!

We stayed in a unit for the weekend.
The bed was like sleeping on a hard floor there was cockroaches crawling on the wall and kitchen benches. My son woke up to one on his pillow I will not b goin bck there
Very well maintained park.

Absolute Gem! We loved every day we stayed at your quiet and relaxing park.

Everything was well maintained, very clean tidy, lots of amenities perfect view for a BBQ. Staff also friendly, and great you can bring your fur baby.

Loved the coffee van that comes through to!

Thanks again.

Great spot, I was only camping in a tent with my two sons. Three powered tents sites weren't that flash as there was some sloping ground and not great access for the other two sites and some sloping ground too. But all and all no complaints 🙂. Toilets and showers were standard. Amazing location, helpful staff, had no  issues. Great park and location I recommend.

Great location,staff and amenities.|I found the camp kitchen was excellent, but for the elderly walking up the hill is often difficult for able bodied people it's great. The many BBQs are very useful and well appointed around the park.| The park isn't really secure because anyone can walk in along the lake. However it's best to take care of your own security.|Otherwise we enjoyed our stay.|
A dog friendly, family friendly holiday park. Water surrounds you and birdlife a plenty. Great for short or long stays.
Fantastic park! Stayed here for 3 days, super clean park, amenities & friendly staff. Great spot in the water, concrete slab site, nice and quite. Will definitely stay there again.
Highly recommend a stay here. Cabins well set out with beautiful views over Lake Macquarie. Very quiet peaceful location. Will definitely be back!

Stayed here last night for a quick overnighted so I was ready for a caravan service…. Honestly, big mistake, should have booked for a week!

Park itself is clean and tidy with great open spaces.  The sites themselves are clean and tidy with large concrete pads.  Parking on sites was super easy and the views back out over the lake just stunning.  Sunrise and sunset are just incredible; the views back over the houses and the marina, yeah wow.

There are concrete paths which go around the outside of the park as well which made getting some light exercise easy.  Plenty of spots to clean fish as well.

Honestly, was saddened it didn’t book a longer stay.  It’s a strong recommend from me!

We stayed here for a night as we were just passing through and wish we could of stayed a little longer. Great little park with a fantastic view of the lake. We were on site 126 and was concrete, long enough that we didn't have to unhitch if we didn't want to and had a view of the lake. Amenities were extremely clean, great park area for the kids to play and a nice walking path around it. Only downfall is the duck/ bird poo around due to the lake but that's the only thing and can't be helped with wildlife around. Park managers were really friendly when we checked in. We would stay again.

Need to reverse the pet friendly park.  People do not pick up droppings and wash dogs in the kitchen sinks and showers.
Need to allocate vans to appropriate size sites. The overcharging for so called lakeside sites when most of the sites have a lake view of some degree. Stop guests from coming in with vans late at night. Dangerous and could cause damage. The toilet doors and wash basin surrounds are covered in scum. Need a good clean NOT a wipe over.

Fantastic Holiday destination; good kids playground, pool. So clean everywhere, grounds, roads and toilets/showers, good Camp Kitchen, outdoor cooking facilities and covered tables, all staff are friendly and helpful, good sites, good walking paths, dog friendly on a lead, magnificent views over Lake Macquarie, great fishing fun for the kids.
